name: Uber
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Uber's design language — a transportation-and-delivery super-app brand whose web surface is a black-and-white duet, framed by a custom geometric display sans, accented by a single signature pill shape (radius 999px) on every interactive element, and decorated only by editorial 4:3 illustrations of riders, drivers, and city objects.
trademark_signals: A two-colour CTA hierarchy: black pill for primary conversion targets
The pill is the single signature shape — 999 px on every interactive element except the tab-toggle ( 36 px) and the larger product cards ( 16 px)
Every headline is sentence-case in / weight 700; no all-caps display
Editorial 4:3 illustrations of riders / drivers / cars are the only consistent decorative system
A signature alternating-band rhythm: white feature card → black promo card (with white text and white CTA) → white feature card → black footer. The black ban...
ai_slop_avoided: introduce a second brand accent colour (orange, blue, green). The brand's entire UI is black-and-white plus grayscale; new accents flatten the system
render the primary CTA as a rectangle except inside the larger ride-request flow (where button-large-rounded is the documented exception)
use all-caps display headlines. Sentence-case is the voice; uppercase is restricted to rare eyebrow tags
